name: round_robin_arbiter
core_function: Fair arbiter that grants one of N requesters and rotates priority after successful grant.
algorithm: When one or more request bits are high, grant exactly one eligible requester. After an acknowledged
structure: Keep a priority pointer containing the index after the last accepted grant.
Mask requests below the priority pointer, grant from high-priority region first, then wrap.
Grant exactly one requester when any request is active.
Rotate only on acknowledged grants, not on idle cycles.
